subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down the verses, made manifest the clear tokens, and illumined the world through His Name, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و نور العالم باسمه المهیمن علی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @humility; meekness; lowliness
